notes: The game crashes immediately on start due to undefined 'paddle' object and undeclared variables (paddleWidth, baseSpeed), making the core gameplay completely unplayable despite a well-designed title screen and attract mode.
Game crashes immediately upon starting due to a fatal ReferenceError (paddle is not defined), and the attract mode bricks are invisible on the title screen.
The game looks roughly like Breakout, but critical undefined variables and inconsistent paddle object usage break core gameplay and make the build largely nonfunctional.
